title: geum molle
intro: Geum molle, also known as New Zealand avens, is a flowering plant native to New Zealand and Australia. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties, which can aid in the treatment of various health issues. The plant is rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties, offering health benefits such as reduced inflammation, improved digestion, and relief from menstrual cramps. Geum molle is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
